examples/demo/src/main/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace the generic Spring RestTemplate bean with a specific OpenAPI-generated PetApi client to align with the new API integration.
Introduce the OpenAPI client library classes for API interaction.
Introduce the specific API interface class for pet operations.
Inject a configuration value for the API base URL to allow dynamic endpoint configuration.

examples/demo/src/test/java/com/example/.general_idea: Replace deprecated APPLICATION_JSON_UTF8_VALUE with APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE to align with Spring Framework 6.x changes.
Wrap service call in try-catch to handle ApiException thrown by the updated client library.
Update imports to reflect changes in package structure for models and exceptions.

jetty/src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/.general_idea: Update import statement to use the new Jetty 12 package structure for WebAppContext.
Update the Configuration array type to use the new Jetty 12 package namespace.
Update imports to use the Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure instead of the legacy EE9 packages.
Add explicit builder initialization in the constructor to satisfy Jetty 12 API requirements for AbstractConfiguration.
Update imports and type casting to use the new Jetty 12 (EE10) package structure and ServletContextApi interface.
